title: Women's Volleyball Analytics
description: Built a win probability and sideout model using XGBoost/GBM on a multi-team flat-file dataset. Integrated model outputs with a partner's RAPM presence model to produce a player +/- impact metric.

title: Sentinel: School Safety App
description: Full-stack safety app using React and Firebase to manage real-time data during emergencies. Integrated an AI chatbot powered by Claude API to guide users to the fastest exit and contact 911.

title: Locked-In: Phone Jail Cell
description: Built a Next.js web application with MongoDB authentication to manage user logins, tasks, and session data. Programmed firmware in C++ (Arduino IDE) to control the lock and timer from the web app.

title: Sports Research Writing Project
description: Analyzed a Kaggle NFL database to identify which offensive strategies correlated with historical team success. Published findings on Medium concluding run-heavy teams had higher win rates, reaching 100+ readers.

title: Student Feedback NLP Pipeline
description: Engineered a Natural Language Processing pipeline using Python and PyTorch to analyze student feedback at Associated Students UCSD. Applied clustering algorithms via Scikit-learn to categorize demographics and uncover hidden correlations.

title: Eclipse Analytics Sports Models
description: Orchestrated Java and Python pipelines to transform raw sports stats into predictive growth analysis and visualizations. Published 10+ articles with 50+ visualizations integrating model-driven insights to substantiate analytical claims.

title: ZIZO Tech Product Reports
description: Created 5+ product reports daily using Python, Java, and JavaScript at ZIZO Tech. Led the team on three successful projects enhancing efficiency by 20% using data-driven insights.

title: NFL Offensive Strategy Analysis
description: Determined whether run-heavy vs pass-heavy teams achieved higher win rates per season using statistical analysis. Utilized Python, Pandas, and Matplotlib to process data, analyze metrics, and create visualizations.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and built a personal portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Implemented dynamic navigation, dark mode switching, and a better contact form with proper URL encoding.

title: SQL Music Database
description: Built a SQLite database schema for Artists and Albums with edge case INSERT handling and JOIN queries. Explored relational database design and query optimization techniques.

title: Real Estate Market Analysis
description: Conducted real estate market analysis covering capture rate, absorption rate, decision traps, and market segmentation frameworks. Applied econometric methods to evaluate market conditions and pricing strategies.

title: UCSD Demographics Clustering
description: Applied clustering algorithms via Scikit-learn to categorize student demographics and uncover hidden correlations in survey data. Developed dynamic statistical visualizations using Matplotlib and Seaborn to drive administrative insights.
